text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Yaeno Muteki and I bump into
Maruzensky while we're out and about.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Wowzah! It's Yaeno and her trainer! ♪ Are you
two having a day out?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Maruzen! What a nice surprise. It's truly an
honor to run into you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
My father, you see, is a huge fan of yours. He
often tells me tales of your great
accomplishments.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Get outta town! Hearing that really makes my
day!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I hear that you're also a master of traditional
training methods. And being unrivaled in speed
and skill alike... Truly, you have my utmost
respect, Maruzen.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I strive every day to achieve the kind of success
you have.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Traditional methods? I don't really know what you
mean, but I'm digging all the compliments!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, bee-tee-dubs! I'm just on my way to this
dynamite place I know. Do you two want to come
with?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
There just might be a groovy li'l secret waiting for
you!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Really?! I would be honored!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although I can't help feeling like there's a massive
misunderstanding, we find ourselves following
Maruzensky to this "dynamite place."

text_block_list.name: Bubbly Girls
text_block_list.text: Ciao, Maruzen! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Ciao, everyone! ♪ This here's my classmate from
the academy, Yaeno, and her trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to introduce you to all the members of
the Bubbly Club! We meet up once a month to
talk about what's hip and happenin' right now!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Oho... You belong to the same dojo? It's a
pleasure to meet you all.

text_block_list.name: Bubbly Girls
text_block_list.text: Word up, racer girl! ♪ Those threads of yours are outta sight! Cop a squat over here and I'll get you a drink.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, cool your jets, girlfriend! This gal here's my
extra-special schoolmate. You're cruisin' for a
bruisin' if you think I'll let you have her all to
yourself!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Out of sight... Cooled Jets... Hmm... What manner
of terminology is this? Are these the names of
martial arts skills?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Here's the skinny, you two. The Bubbly Squad's
always on the lookout for the freshest pads and
hippest trends.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And today, you're honorary members of the
party! Up first on the agenda is...

text_block_list.name: The Entire Bubbly Club
text_block_list.text: La la laaa! ♪

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hm! An iron fan technique?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Okay, don't hold back! I want you to get real
jiggy, real fast!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Concealed weaponry... How profound! Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Far out! You nailed it! Looks like you could fight
till sunrise without batting an eyelid! ♪

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Laa! Laa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the Bubbly Club training in "special"
techniques continues...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for everything today, Maruzen. I
learned a great deal!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Not at all! I had a total blast! ♪ If you ever feel
like sampling the latest in modern trends again,
you know who to ask! Toodles! ♪

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen really is amazing. Even outside the
academy, she trains diligently alongside her
companions.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That said, she said "latest," but I felt the whole
thing had more of a retro feel.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes. However, she heavily implied that their
activities were new in nature. She must have
meant...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: That what's old is new again!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Working ancient techniques into fresh ideas... I
believe this must be the very source of Maruzen's
strength!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Working ancient techniques into fresh ideas... I
believe this must be the very source of Maruzen's
strength!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. She is precisely as I'd envisioned from
observing her races.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
To have attained such mastery as a student is
extraordinary. Maruzen is in a different league
altogether.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
If it's not too forward, I'm hoping she'll allow me
to call her my venerable teacher.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I firmly insist that she does not pursue that train
of thought, and our outing draws to a close.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The Bubble Style, yes... Perhaps someday that
style will come into fashion in its own right and
bring about something of a "bubble era."

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It would be a peaceful period defined by diligent
training and well-earned rest. Truly, it would be a
time for both maxin' and chillaxin'.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Is something the matter? You look as if you could
use a chill pill.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since Yaeno Muteki can already sound a bit
old-fashioned at times, I'm not sure whether her
vernacular has become more or less modern.
Either way, she speaks like this for the next few
days.
